overall.description: A high-quality game engine cinematic showing a third-person camera following a character through a narrow, foggy canyon with rocky cliffs and shallow water. The atmosphere is misty and desaturated, with sparse vegetation clinging to the rock faces.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty canyon ravine with rocky walls and shallow stream

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the misty canyon, exploring the rocky terrain ahead

entered.detail: tall steep rock face with layered sedimentary texture
tall steep rock face casting shadows in the mist
rocky ground with shallow water puddles and wet stones
overcast sky visible through the canyon opening with heavy fog
dry reddish-brown vegetation clinging to the cliff base

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward through a narrow, fog-filled canyon. Tall rocky cliffs rise on both sides with sparse dry vegetation at their base. The ground is wet and uneven with shallow puddles reflecting the diffused light.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty canyon approaching a figure in the distance

events.description: character figure becomes visible in the distance walking ahead through the canyon

agents.ego_description: approaching a figure walking ahead through the shallow water in the canyon

notable_agents.action: walking away from camera through the canyon stream, wearing dark clothing with a cape

entered.detail: humanoid figure in dark clothing with a cape or cloak walking ahead

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues through the canyon, a character figure becomes visible through the mist, walking ahead in the same direction. The figure wears dark clothing and moves steadily through the shallow water, gradually growing larger as the camera approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty canyon passing the character figure

events.description: camera draws alongside and passes the character figure on the left side

agents.ego_description: passing the character on the left and continuing forward through the canyon

notable_agents.action: standing still or moving slowly as the camera passes by on the right

entered.detail: bright opening at the end of the canyon where the ravine continues

segments.scene_description: The camera closes the distance and passes the character figure on the left side, revealing more details of their dark clothing and equipment. The canyon continues ahead toward a brighter opening in the distance, with the rocky walls now closer on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a claustrophobic, fog-shrouded canyon that gradually reveals a solitary traveler heading toward a distant light. It begins by gliding through a narrow passage of towering rocky cliffs and wet, uneven ground where shallow puddles reflect a diffused, misty light. As the camera advances, a figure in dark clothing emerges from the haze, walking steadily through the shallow water and growing larger in the frame. The scene then shifts as the camera closes the distance and passes the character on the left, bringing their equipment into focus while the canyon walls tighten on both sides. Finally, the perspective pushes forward past the figure toward a brighter opening that glows in the distance.
